holdings.infoBox: TPSC is an equity ETF with a total of 438 individual holdings. The top holdings are IDACORP stock at 0.47%, The Hanover Insurance Group at 0.45%, New Jersey Resources at 0.43%, Avista at 0.42%, and Southwest Gas Holdings at 0.42%.

overview.description: The Timothy Plan US Small Cap Core ETF (TPSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a volatility-weighted index of U.S small-caps screened for defined Christian values. TPSC was launched on Dec 2, 2019 and is issued by Timothy Plan.
